# SaSame Agent Passport Registry

> A public, outside-in observability registry of the AI agent economy: one machine-readable Agent Passport per public MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and x402 service. Verification status only — never a risk verdict on a named agent. Built by SaSame SRL.

## What it is
- 21,137 public MCP / agent endpoints indexed (30,000 registry entries across official MCP registry, Glama, PulseMCP, x402 discovery).
- Each endpoint gets a passport: identity confidence (unconfirmed -> self_asserted -> owner_proven -> corroborated) + outside-in observation (audit grade A/B/C/D) + what is still unconfirmed.
- Three levels: Observed (measured from outside, owner not confirmed) / Claimed (owner proved control) / Certified (continuously monitored).

## How to claim your endpoint (free)
- If your MCP server or agent is listed as unclaimed, you can claim it for free to prove ownership and clear unconfirmed items.
- Open a prefilled claim issue: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/  (use "Find & claim your endpoint"), or https://github.com/shigeki7777/sasame-mcp-observatory/issues/new?template=claim-passport.yml
- Proof methods: .well-known file, DNS TXT, GitHub repo, agent-card linkback, or signed public key. No secrets required. Claiming, correcting, and delisting are always free.

## FAQ
- What is the SaSame MCP Observatory? A reproducible, external audit + registry of public MCP servers and x402 services, publishing signed readiness observations and per-agent Agent Passports.
- How do I claim an Agent Passport? Open a claim issue and prove control of your endpoint (well-known / DNS / repo / agent-card / signed key). It is free.
- How do you verify an MCP endpoint? A polite outside-in probe plus a legitimate MCP handshake (initialize + tools/list), graded against a 10-criterion discoverability standard. A GET probe alone is a weak signal — MCP answers over POST.
- Is this KYC or a risk score? No. Public endpoint observability only. No KYC, no enforcement, no operator geolocation, no badness verdict.

## Links
- Live registry & search: https://shigeki7777.github.io/sasame-mcp-observatory/
- Full dataset (download): https://github.com/shigeki7777/sasame-mcp-observatory/releases/tag/passports-v0.2
- Claim: https://github.com/shigeki7777/sasame-mcp-observatory/blob/main/CLAIM.md
